description: Two character-layer endpoints. Two Galar-region cohort nodes. Both already cross-reference each other in their See also sections in prose; the galarian-regional-forms body explicitly frames them as the two halves of Galar's BBL-relevant presence — institutional apparatus on one side, material-ecological substrate on the other. The wave 13 E2 sidecar named this pair as the strongest fanout candidate for the related_characters: field after the endriders ↔ aether-rangers first instance landed. Mirror written to both frontmatters. Field is now populated bidirectionally; graph-traversable from either endpoint; prose-level cross-references in See also already do the narrative work and stay where they are. Standard professional sigh on the mirror. The fanout is moving — one pair down on this pass, six pairs left to backfill at appropriate future moments.
citations: [galar-gym-challenge.md body: 'This pairs structurally with the [[galar-gym-challenge]] node's institutional thesis']
[galarian-regional-forms.md body line 37: 'Together they anchor the two halves of the Galar region's BBL-relevant presence']
[galarian-regional-forms.md See also: cross-reference to galar-gym-challenge as sibling Galar-region character node]
[BBL wave 13 E2 sidecar: schema-fanout candidate list naming this pair as strongest backfill]
[endriders.md / aether-rangers.md: first-instance precedent for related_characters: field]
other_candidates_considered: Pure refusal — both nodes already cross-reference in prose, so the schema mirror is arguably redundant. Rejected: the wave 13 sidecar explicitly flagged this as the strongest backfill candidate, prose cross-references are not graph-traversable, and the related_characters: field IS the graph-traversable surface. The mirror does load-bearing work the prose can't.

Backfilling all 6 documented related_characters: pairs in one pass (galar-gym-challenge ↔ galarian-regional-forms, charizard-line ↔ galar-gym-challenge, elemental-monkey-trio ↔ galarian-regional-forms, fear-of-cycle ↔ dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle, orzhov-syndicate ↔ azorius-senate, nicol-bolas ↔ jace-beleren / tamiyo). Rejected: Edgelord protocol is one edge per invocation; surface as future-pass candidates.

charizard-line ↔ galar-gym-challenge as a candidate now that E1 created the charizard-line node, anchored on the Vivid Voltage Charizard's Leon-card-discard-pile Royal Blaze attack mechanically citing Champion Leon's signature Gigantamax Charizard. Surfaced as the strongest *new* candidate generated by this triple-pass's E1; recommended for next-pass backfill.
